financial_aid.aspire_grant: NEW for 2025-2026: Illinois students from families earning under $75,000/year pay $0 in tuition and fees. Visit free.uic.edu
financial_aid.percent_receiving_aid: 65-70% of undergrads receive some financial aid
financial_aid.fafsa: Complete FAFSA to determine eligibility. Most scholarships require no separate application — you're auto-considered after applying to UIC.
financial_aid.scholarship_priority_date: Apply by the Scholarship Priority Date to maximize eligibility

tuition.notes: More than half of full-time undergrads pay less than $3,000/semester in tuition and fees after aid.

housing.overview: UIC operates 10 residence halls with 32 different room styles. No deadline to apply but apply early for preferences.
housing.application: Apply at housing.uic.edu once admitted. Applications for 2026-2027 go live December 15, 2025.

residence_halls.name: Academic & Residential Complex (ARC)
residence_halls.description: Private or shared 2-person bedrooms, connected to multimedia lecture classrooms. Most popular for freshmen.

residence_halls.name: James Stukel Towers (JST)
residence_halls.description: High-rise tower dorm, great views of Chicago.

residence_halls.name: Commons North (CMN)
residence_halls.description: Close to classrooms and student support services.

residence_halls.name: Marie Robinson Hall (MRH)
residence_halls.description: Apartment-style with private bedrooms, full kitchens, private bedrooms, and shared bathrooms. No meal plan required — great for upperclassmen who want to cook.

residence_halls.name: Thomas Beckham Hall (TBH)
residence_halls.description: Apartment-style, studio, 2-bedroom, and 4-bedroom options. No required meal plan.

plans.name: Ignite 15
plans.description: 15 meal swipes/week + $50 Flames Fare + 5 guest passes/semester

plans.name: Default if no selection
plans.description: Automatically assigned 15 meals/week + $50 Flames Fare if you don't pick a plan

meal_plans.notes: Meal swipes and Flames Fare roll over to next semester. Guest passes do not roll over. Changes only allowed in first 10 days of semester. Flames Fare works at any dining location on campus.

housing.tips: MRH and TBH are best for upperclassmen who want apartment-style living and to cook their own food. ARC is most popular for freshmen. Apply ASAP if you have a specific hall preference.
